zh.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh.Great Birch, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Gernon於1250年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Sir Ralph Gernon30歲，母親Eleanor De Vere32歲。他於從1279年到1309年與Margaret Wygeton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年1月12日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.Bakewell, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾貝克韋爾_
zh-hans.Great Birch, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Gernon于1250年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Gernon30岁，母亲Eleanor De Vere32岁。他于从1279年到1309年与Margaret Wygeton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年1月12日在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Gernon was born in 1250, in Essex, England, his father, Sir Ralph Gernon, was 30 and his mother, Eleanor De Vere, was 32. He married Margaret Wygeton from 1279 to 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 January 1327, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Gernon est né en 1250, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Gernon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eleanor De Vere, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wygeton du 1279 au 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1327, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Gernon 1250 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Gernon 30 und seine Mutter Eleanor De Vere 32. Er hat von 1279 bis 1309 Margaret Wygeton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Januar 1327 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Gernon è nato il nel 1250 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Gernon, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor De Vere, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Wygeton da 1279 a 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 gennaio 1327, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Gernonが1250年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Gernonは30歳，母Eleanor De Vereは32歳であった。から1279年まで1309年にMargaret Wygetonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年1月12日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Gernon(이)가 1250년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Gernon(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor De Vere(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1279년 부터 1309년 까지 Margaret Wygeton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 12일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Great Birch, Cambridgeshire, England: Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Gernon nasceu em 1250, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Gernon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor De Vere, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wygeton de 1279 a 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1327, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Gernon родился в 1250 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Gernon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor De Vere, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wygeton с 1279 по 1309. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 января 1327 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

sm.BET 1279 AND 1309: mai le 1279 e o'o I le 1309

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Gernon nació en 1250, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Gernon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor De Vere, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Wygeton desde 1279 hasta 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de enero de 1327, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
